name: Fan Bingbing 范冰冰
fullText:
A beautiful journey with you — thank you, Director Chong Keat Aun.
与你同行，是一段美好的旅程，谢谢你，张吉安导演。

Between light and shadow, stories find their way.
Udine feels like a beautiful scene I never want to leave. 🎞️ #FEFF28 https://t.co/eHSNWWaGgR
